creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 235707
devel/objconv: update to 2.53_3

Upstream has once again changed the distfile without bumping the version.

Upstream changes:

 - misc documentation updates

Tested with Poudriere on armv7 arm64 FreeBSD 13.1.
As there is no changelog for this rerolled distfile, please preserve the comment in the commit.
As there are no code changes and no bug fixes, there doesn't seem to be any need to MFH this update.
